title: Exhaustion Values
description: Defines how much exhaustion each player action should take.

attack.title: Attack
attack.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when attacking.

Sample values:
• player: 0.1

damage.title: Damage
damage.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when taking damage.

Sample values:
• player: 0.1

heal.title: Heal
heal.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when healed through food regeneration.

Sample values:
• player: 6

jump.title: Jump
jump.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when jumping.

Sample values:
• player: 0.05

lunge.title: Lunge
lunge.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when triggering the lunge enchantment, multiplied by the enchantment level.

Sample values:
• player: 4

mine.title: Mine
mine.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when mining.

Sample values:
• player: 0.005

sprint.title: Sprint
sprint.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when sprinting.

Sample values:
• player: 0.1

sprint_jump.title: Sprint Jump
sprint_jump.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when sprint jumping.

Sample values:
• player: 0.2

swim.title: Swim
swim.description:
Amount of exhaustion applied when swimming.

Sample values:
• player: 0.01

walk.title: Walk
walk.description: Amount of exhaustion applied when walking.
